entity.summary: Claims-and-derivatives trading platform launched from the CoinFLEX rebrand and shut down in February 2024.
entity.notes: HEI records Seychelles as OPNX's corporate incorporation origin. Contemporary reporting also identified a Hong Kong office and later disputes over the extent of continuity with CoinFLEX, so this field does not resolve the separate lineage question. Shutdown date is supported by strong reporting; predecessor and successor links remain pending A3-A4 review.

expected.notes: Shutdown date is supported by strong reporting, but this retained batch does not include a direct official closure notice; future predecessor and successor review should decide whether CoinFLEX and OPNX remain separate HEI entities or linked lineage records.

changes.notes: HEI records Seychelles as OPNX's corporate incorporation origin. Contemporary reporting also identified a Hong Kong office and later disputes over the extent of continuity with CoinFLEX, so this field does not resolve the separate lineage question. Shutdown date is supported by strong reporting; predecessor and successor links remain pending A3-A4 review.

evidence.title: Hobbled Crypto Exchange's Creditors Are Suing Its CEO and Want to Claw Back Money From 'Bitcoin Jesus'
evidence.notes: The report identifies OPNX as incorporated in Seychelles while maintaining an office in Hong Kong. HEI uses the incorporation jurisdiction for country_or_origin and preserves the separate continuity dispute in notes.
